name: M4A4 | 波塞冬
descriptionEn: More accurate but less damaging than its AK-47 counterpart, the M4A4 is the full-auto assault rifle of choice for CTs. It has been custom painted with a depiction of a battle between Pisces and Poseidon. Three can keep a secret if two of them are dead
descriptionZh: 与同级的 AK-47 相比更精准，但杀伤力更低，M4A4 是反恐精英可选的全自动突击步枪。 这把武器使用对双鱼座和波塞冬之间战斗的刻画进行了自定义涂装。 三人行，必死二人，方可保密
